mapper.select: SELECT * FROM store_operation_config WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM store_operation_config WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE
SELECT * FROM store_operation_config WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY store_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store_operation_config( store_id, business_end_time, home_slogan, hero_image, gameplay_description, menu_title, points_halving_enabled, points_halving_day, points_halving_time, points_halving_last_period, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{storeId}, #{businessEndTime}, #{homeSlogan}, #{heroImage}, #{gameplayDescription}, #{menuTitle}, #{pointsHalvingEnabled}, #{pointsHalvingDay}, #{pointsHalvingTime}, #{pointsHalvingLastPeriod}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE business_end_time = VALUES(business_end_time), home_slogan = VALUES(home_slogan), hero_image = VALUES(hero_image), gameplay_description = VALUES(gameplay_description), menu_title = VALUES(menu_title), points_halving_enabled = VALUES(points_halving_enabled), points_halving_day = VALUES(points_halving_day), points_halving_time = VALUES(points_halving_time), update_time = NOW(), deleted = 0
